narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है, जिसमें आर्थिक प्रतिबंध भी शामिल हैं। इन वजहों से रूस की हालत खस्ता हुई है
narratives.reasoning: The text explicitly links Russia's 'खस्ता' (deteriorated) condition to Western sanctions, highlighting the negative impact of Western actions on Russia. This frames the sanctions as a cause of Russia's decline, which aligns with the narrative of predicting or reporting adverse outcomes for Russia due to Western policies.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है, जिसमें आर्थिक प्रतिबंध भी शामिल हैं। इन वजहों से रूस की हालत खस्ता हुई है, जबकि वह दुनिया का दूसरा शक्तिशाली देश माना जाता रहा है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote directly attributes Russia's 'खस्ता' (dilapidated) condition to the sanctions imposed by Western countries, framing the sanctions as the cause of Russia's decline in power rankings. This catastrophizes the negative effects of Western sanctions on Russia, actively promoting the idea that the sanctions have successfully weakened a major power, which is a core element of the 'sanctions will backfire' narrative as it implies the West's actions have had a significant negative consequence for their adversary.
